name: smart-pen-v2.0
description: Smart Pen System for Parkinson's Disease Monitoring

scripts.build: npm run backend:build && npm run frontend:build
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:setup
scripts.db:setup: cd backend && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed
scripts.test: cd backend && npm test && cd ../frontend && npm test
scripts.lint: cd backend && npm run lint && cd ../frontend && npm run lint
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules backend/node_modules frontend/node_modules && npm install

author: Smart Pen Team
